description: DIRECTION template, not detected directly - only reached via directory nesting (django, fastapi, flask, its own children) or explicit `extends` from bots/python.json (telegram-python). Python backend language intelligence, shared regardless of framework.

plugins.description: Python language server (Pyright) for type checking and code intelligence.

_notes: Same database/queue caveat as backend/node/_base.json: no generic DB/queue plugin exists in the official catalog - see DB/_base.json's _notes for MCP-server alternatives.
